# Security Policy

## Reporting Security Issues

This is an educational repository containing Kubernetes YAML examples and study materials.
If you find any YAML examples that demonstrate insecure practices without clear warnings,
please open a GitHub Issue.

## Scope

- Insecure Kubernetes configurations presented without security warnings
- Typos in security-critical commands
- Incorrect RBAC or SecurityContext examples that could mislead learners

## Out of Scope

- Issues with third-party tools (kubectl, Helm, Kubernetes itself)
- Feature requests

Please open an issue at: https://github.com/ChathurangaVKD/ckad-exam-prep/issues
